Step 1 of 4 — Character Creation

Who Are You?

Your background and traits shape how the community responds to you — and what options open up when crises hit.

Character Name *required
⚠ A character name is required to continue.
This is how your character will be addressed throughout the game.

Select Your Traits (choose 2)

Step 2 of 4 — Organization

Choose Your Organization

Each organization type comes with its own culture, donor base, and political pressures. Your org's traits combine with your own throughout the game.

⚙ Advanced: Customize your organization's security priorities
Adjust how much each dimension of Jewish Security matters to your organization. Higher weight = bigger impact on your composite score. Most players should use the defaults.
Preview composite: —
Step 3 of 4 — Mission

What Is Your Mission?

Your mission defines what your organization stands for. Every decision you make will be flagged as Mission Aligned ✓ or Mission Opposed ✗ — and you'll see it before you choose.

Step 4 of 4 — Advisory Team

Build Your Advisory Team

Choose the people who will counsel you through the hardest decisions. Your advisors shape your starting position and influence outcomes throughout the game.

Select 3 advisors to continue
